responsibilities: Conduct materials characterization and mechanical testing to validate material properties against engineering specifications
Perform root cause failure analysis on field returns and production defects using SEM, XRD, and metallurgical techniques
Select and qualify materials for new product designs based on strength, durability, cost, and manufacturability requirements
Develop and execute corrosion, fatigue, and environmental stress testing protocols to validate material performance
Collaborate with design and manufacturing engineers to resolve material-related defects and process deviations
Document materials test results, specifications, and certification reports for regulatory and customer compliance
Evaluate new material technologies and vendor capabilities to support cost reduction and performance improvement initiatives
Lead investigations into material non-conformance issues and recommend corrective actions to prevent recurrence
